subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 3: Language - Grammar
description: Câu tường thuật cho mệnh lệnh, yêu cầu, lời đề nghị và lời khuyên

theory.title: Grammar: Reported Speech for Commands, Requests, Offers, and Advice

sections.heading: A. Tường thuật mệnh lệnh (Reported Commands)
sections.content:
1. Mệnh lệnh khẳng định:

  • Cấu trúc: S + told/ordered/commanded + O + to V
  • Direct: "Study harder!" she said to me.
  • Reported: She told me to study harder.
  • Direct: "Finish your homework!" the teacher said.
  • Reported: The teacher ordered us to finish our homework.

2. Mệnh lệnh phủ định:

  • Cấu trúc: S + told/ordered + O + not to V
  • Direct: "Don't be late!" she said to me.
  • Reported: She told me not to be late.
  • Direct: "Don't forget!" he said.
  • Reported: He ordered us not to forget.

sections.heading: B. Tường thuật yêu cầu (Reported Requests)
sections.content:
1. Yêu cầu khẳng định:

  • Cấu trúc: S + asked/requested + O + to V
  • Direct: "Please help me," she said.
  • Reported: She asked me to help her.
  • Direct: "Could you attend?" he said.
  • Reported: He requested us to attend.

2. Yêu cầu phủ định:

  • Cấu trúc: S + asked/requested + O + not to V
  • Direct: "Please don't tell anyone," she said.
  • Reported: She asked me not to tell anyone.

sections.heading: C. Tường thuật lời đề nghị (Reported Offers)
sections.content:
1. Đề nghị làm gì cho người khác:

  • Cấu trúc: S + offered/volunteered + to V
  • Direct: "I'll help you," she said.
  • Reported: She offered to help me.
  • Direct: "Shall I carry your bag?" he said.
  • Reported: He offered to carry my bag.

sections.heading: D. Tường thuật lời khuyên (Reported Advice)
sections.content:
1. Lời khuyên khẳng định:

  • Cấu trúc: S + advised/recommended + O + to V
  • Direct: "You should take this course," she said.
  • Reported: She advised me to take that course.

2. Lời khuyên phủ định:

  • Cấu trúc: S + advised/warned + O + not to V
  • Direct: "You shouldn't give up," she said.
  • Reported: She advised me not to give up.

3. Suggest:

  • Cấu trúc: S + suggested + V-ing
  • Direct: "Let's study together," she said.
  • Reported: She suggested studying together.
  • Hoặc: S + suggested + (that) + S + (should) + V
  • Reported: She suggested that we (should) study together.

exercises.question: Choose: 'Study harder!' → She _____ me to study harder.
exercises.explanation: Told + O + to V cho mệnh lệnh.

exercises.question: Complete: 'Please help me.' → She _____ me to help her.
exercises.explanation: Asked + O + to V cho yêu cầu.

exercises.question: Choose: 'I'll help you.' → She _____ to help me.
exercises.explanation: Offered + to V cho lời đề nghị.

exercises.question: Complete: 'You should study.' → She _____ me to study.
exercises.explanation: Advised + O + to V cho lời khuyên.

exercises.question: Choose: 'Don't be late!' → She told me _____ late.
exercises.explanation: Not to V cho mệnh lệnh phủ định.

exercises.question: Complete: 'Let's study together.' → She suggested _____ together.
exercises.explanation: Suggested + V-ing.

exercises.question: Choose: 'Finish your work!' → The teacher _____ us to finish our work.
exercises.explanation: Told + O + to V.

exercises.question: Complete: 'Could you attend?' → He _____ us to attend.
exercises.explanation: Requested + O + to V cho yêu cầu.

exercises.question: Choose: 'I'll teach you.' → He _____ to teach me.
exercises.explanation: Volunteered + to V.

exercises.question: Complete: 'You shouldn't give up.' → She _____ me not to give up.
exercises.explanation: Advised + O + not to V.

exercises.question: Which is correct?
exercises.explanation: Told + O + to V là cấu trúc đúng.

exercises.question: Choose: 'Please don't tell anyone.' → She asked me _____ anyone.
exercises.explanation: Not to V cho yêu cầu phủ định.

exercises.question: Complete: 'Shall I help you?' → He _____ to help me.
exercises.explanation: Offered + to V.

exercises.question: Choose: 'You should take the course.' → She _____ me to take the course.
exercises.explanation: Recommended + O + to V.

exercises.question: Which sentence is correct?
exercises.explanation: Suggested + V-ing.

options: She asked me to help her.
She advised me to take the course.
exercises.explanation: a) True. b) True. c) False - offered to help. d) True.

exercises.question_text: Mark True if the grammar is correct:
options: He ordered us to finish the work.
exercises.explanation: a) True. b) True. c) True. d) False - suggested studying.
Told + O + to V.

exercises.question_text: Complete: She _____ me to help her. (asked/said)
exercises.explanation: Asked + O + to V.
Offered + to V.
